title: Epic Fight - Sword Soaring
description: You will enter the world of Chinese ancient martial arts novels, experiencing epic skills and heroic journeys.
body: **** **Use 文言-華夏 (lzh) to Obtain an Enhanced Experience** **使用 文言-華夏 以獲更嘉之體驗** Add a new legend weapon: **Vatansever**  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_e3ba962d-bed2-4fd7-938a-e495d09fffa4.png) press **shift** to see it's combos info. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_f9ad8556-db3e-4ffa-9110-a3202d20a413.png)   If you installed [Epic Fight: Skill Tree](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-skill-tree) , there is a default skill tree for sword soaring mod.   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_d3ca7e7f-83d3-405c-a526-63faaebadad6.png) Add some sword skills to epic fight, especially sword soaring. You can use [SwordSoaringLivingMotions](https://github.com/GaylordFockerCN/SwordSoaring-Reborn/blob/1.20.1-20.12/src/main/java/net/p1nero/ss/gameassets/SwordSoaringLivingMotions.java) to set custom sword soaring animation for your custom weapon. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_07590108-40f6-49c0-aa2a-8111c16428b9.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_c7a2bcaa-4fa0-4e6f-8479-3c5811bb54cd.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_5e18b0f7-906c-42dd-b70f-bd0d558f0b88.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_8b39c607-9412-4c1b-9f7b-d74448f6dada.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_391e16ac-10cb-4868-a522-ed48c21d4897.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_0882f4c8-ae44-40e7-8ece-bd8b92909fb8.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_359e33b2-3507-42a5-8009-6072acec40e7.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_74b53299-98c1-40b5-810a-8eb16ee36844.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1011068/description_0a8200f1-4d02-4a8c-964e-27db8d8e2f7b.png)
